description: Paper-graph concept manifest for FedAvg (McMahan et al. 2017), derived from 02-math-deep-dive.md. Foundation prereqs are stable URLs into pleyva2004/math-foundations (unverified offline; a 404 means the foundation concept is not yet authored).

concepts.title: Finite-Sum Objective
concepts.summary: The global objective f(w)=(1/n) sum_i f_i(w): an unweighted average of per-example losses, the target FedAvg minimizes.

concepts.title: Client-Partition Decomposition
concepts.summary: f(w)=sum_k (n_k/n) F_k(w): an exact algebraic identity rewriting the objective as a data-size-weighted convex combination of per-client losses.

concepts.title: IID vs Non-IID
concepts.summary: IID means E_{P_k}[F_k(w)]=f(w) (each client's loss is an unbiased proxy for the global); non-IID is the failure of this identity.

concepts.title: FedSGD as Exact Gradient Descent
concepts.summary: sum_k (n_k/n) g_k = grad f(w_t), so FedSGD (B=inf,E=1,C=1) is exactly distributed full-batch gradient descent.

concepts.title: Gradient- vs Model-Averaging Equivalence
concepts.summary: Averaging one local gradient step equals one global step because sum_k n_k/n = 1; the hinge that lets FedSGD be reorganized as model averaging.

concepts.title: FedAvg: Iterated Local Steps
concepts.summary: FedAvg iterates the local SGD step tau>1 times before averaging; for tau>=2 the round map is no longer any number of centralized GD steps.

concepts.title: Local-Update Count u=nE/(KB)
concepts.summary: u_k=E n_k/B local updates per client; expected u=nE/(KB). The (C,E,B) knob that trades on-device compute for communication rounds.

concepts.title: Heterogeneity Gap = eta^2 Cov_k(H_k,g_k)
concepts.summary: For E>1 the per-round deviation from centralized GD is, to leading order, eta^2 Cov_k(H_k,g_k): a pure client-heterogeneity term (zero when IID).

concepts.title: Client-Sampling Unbiasedness (Horvitz-Thompson)
concepts.summary: Under uniform client sampling, inverse-probability (Horvitz-Thompson) weighting makes the partial-participation gradient an unbiased estimator of grad f.

concepts.title: Aggregation Erratum: normalize by m_t
concepts.summary: The corrected average w_{t+1}=sum_{k in S} (n_k/m_t) w^k (m_t over selected clients); summing n_k/n instead shrinks the model by the factor C each round.

concepts.title: Parameter Averaging & Jensen
concepts.summary: For convex F_k, Jensen gives f(avg) <= avg f, so averaging is safe; non-convex nets have no such guarantee.

concepts.title: Shared-Init & the Permutation Barrier
concepts.summary: Independently-initialized nets land in incompatible permutation-orbit basins (Fig 1 barrier); FedAvg broadcasts a shared w_t each round to keep clients in one basin.

edges_note: Local prereqs are <NN> ids within this manifest; URL prereqs point into the foundations repo. Topological order is 01..12.
